description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image and runs a before_script that updates apt, installs python-dev python-pip bridge-utils qemu, upgrades setuptools via pip, and installs the project with python setup.py install. Define a job named irati-test in the test stage that executes the command python examples/vpn.py. Define a pages job in the deploy stage that runs pip install sphinx sphinx_rtd_theme then sphinx-build doc/ public/, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
